TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kamisatu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga buwan, hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga kyan ku hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga kyan ku hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Kamisatu hya' ga Kainisungan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kamisatu ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan qalang Kamisatu ga ungat ssquliq pinlpgan . ppqbaqan qalang Kamisatu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kamis~ɕatu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ɣenħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa βuwan, ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa kjan ku ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa kjan ku ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na kamis~ɕatu ħjaʔ ɣa kainis~ɕuŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kamis~ɕatu ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan qalaŋ kamis~ɕatu ɣa uŋat s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan . ppqβaqan qalaŋ kamis~ɕatu ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kamisatu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga buwan, hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga kyan ku hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga kyan ku hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Kamisatu hya' ga Kainisungan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kamisatu ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan qalang Kamisatu ga ungat ssquliq pinlpgan . ppqbaqan qalang Kamisatu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kamis~ɕatu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ɣenħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa βuwan, ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa kjan ku ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa kjan ku ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na kamis~ɕatu ħjaʔ ɣa kainis~ɕuŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kamis~ɕatu ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan qalaŋ kamis~ɕatu ɣa uŋat s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan . ppqβaqan qalaŋ kamis~ɕatu ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
